question: At Pentecost, what visible sign appears on the gathered believers, and what immediate ability do they receive?

choices.A: Tongues like fire appear, and they speak in other languages
choices.B: A rainbow appears, and they see visions of animals
choices.C: A cloud covers the room, and they become invisible
choices.D: A quake shakes the city, and they stop speaking

teaching.title: Pentecost signs
teaching.body: Acts describes “tongues as of fire” and the believers speaking in other tongues/languages as the Spirit gives utterance.
